task: Φ* v3 canonical Jamba 1.5 Mini (52B/12B-active hybrid SSM-Transformer) measurement — RETRY of aeba4c5724 (which itself retried ad152b110)

block_evidence.message: Access to model ai21labs/AI21-Jamba-Mini-1.5 is restricted and you are not in the authorized list
block_evidence.cause: HF token transmitted to pod (cat /workspace/.hf_token) but user account lacks gated-repo agreement for ai21labs/AI21-Jamba-Mini-1.5

graceful_exit.policy_source: task spec — 'rate-limit 시 graceful exit + main 보고'
graceful_exit.interpretation: gated-repo 403 = equivalent access-block to rate-limit; same graceful-exit path applied

hypothesis_judgment_HJ.reasoning: Cannot reject or validate any Φ* hypothesis (H6A/H6B/H6C/H8B etc.) — model load failed at HF download stage. No phi_star_min computed.

what_would_have_been_tested.H_jamba_mini_vs_jamba_v01: phi_star_min(Jamba-1.5-Mini) ?= phi_star_min(Jamba-v0.1)=+3.3115 (jamba_run2, #193). Same 52B/12B-active architecture, instruction-tuned variant — would test whether instruction-tuning shifts integration metric.
what_would_have_been_tested.H_jamba_mini_vs_mamba: phi_star_min(Jamba-1.5-Mini) ?> phi_star_min(Mamba-2.8b)=+0.3258 (#176). Hybrid SSM+attention (Jamba) vs pure SSM (Mamba) — would test attention contribution to integration.
what_would_have_been_tested.H_jamba_mini_vs_4bb_transformer: phi_star_min(Jamba-1.5-Mini) ?∈ {mistral -16.70, gemma -0.79, qwen3 +1.04, llama +5.09} → would map hybrid into transformer family ordering.

prior_jamba_data_unaffected.comment: Jamba-v0.1 (52B same family) Φ* measurement remains valid. The Jamba 1.5 Mini retry was an instruction-tuned variant test, not a primary measurement — Jamba family Φ* v3 evidence already exists at +3.3115 PROVISIONAL_PASS.

lessons_learned.L1: Gated HF models require manual user agreement on huggingface.co/<model> page; HF token alone insufficient if user not in authorized list.
lessons_learned.L2: Pre-flight check needed: WebFetch model page → check if 'You have been granted access' appears for current user before pod launch.
lessons_learned.L3: AI21-Jamba-Mini-1.5 == 52B/12B-active = identical size to Jamba-v0.1 (NOT cheaper variant). User initial framing ('~12-26GB bf16') was inaccurate — Mini refers to MoE active-experts (12B) not total (52B).
lessons_learned.L4: $0.117 spent on infra (pod create + ssh + scp + pip + 1 forward attempt) — orchestrator caps + auto-terminate worked as designed.

raw_10_honest.1: Φ* v3 of Jamba-1.5-Mini was NOT measured. Cannot compare to mamba/transformer/jamba-v0.1.
raw_10_honest.2: Cost $0.117 is sunk — pod ran 2.35min before HF 403 returned mid-tokenizer-load.
raw_10_honest.3: Could pre-check gated-repo access via WebFetch but did not — saved $0 worst-case but enabled fail-fast detection.
raw_10_honest.4: Task framing ('cheaper variant ~12-26GB') was empirically wrong; spec said cap $0.50 which would have been insufficient anyway for 52B 2x A100 download (jamba_run2 used $0.34).
raw_10_honest.5: Jamba-v0.1 jamba_run2 (#193) Φ* +3.3115 already constitutes valid Jamba family measurement — instruction-tuned variant test was bonus, not blocker.
raw_10_honest.6: HJ verdict NOT_TESTED is honest — no integration with HJ-true/false claims for jamba-1.5-mini specifically.
raw_10_honest.7: All pod resources auto-terminated; no leak.
raw_10_honest.8: Follow-up actionable: user manually agree to gated-repo on HF, then re-launch ($0.30-0.50 next cycle).
raw_10_honest.9: Or accept Jamba-v0.1 as Jamba-family canonical proxy and close axis without 1.5-Mini.
raw_10_honest.10: Single-cell measurement design unchanged — gated-block is orthogonal to metric/methodology.

follow_up_actionable: JAMBA15-MINI-GATED-RETRY: prerequisite — user agree at https://huggingface.co/ai21labs/AI21-Jamba-Mini-1.5 (need manual click + form acceptance). Then re-run with same orchestrator command. Alternative: try non-gated AI21 variants (none currently — all Jamba 1.5/1.6 Mini gated per WebFetch).
